prevalence.source: ENT and vestibular disorder epidemiology syntheses

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; significant dizziness and fall risk

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Acute vertigo with nausea and hearing symptoms; exclude stroke; audiometry and vestibular testing when available

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; improves with vestibular rehab and symptomatic therapy

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Clinical diagnosis in primary care/ENT; limited vestibular testing outside tertiary centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Vestibular suppressants short-term, antiemetics, vestibular rehabilitation; treat underlying otitis if present
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Delayed ENT access and limited vestibular rehab services
